publication_date: The date '2021 Aug 20' is correct for the publication of this paper in Science online. The DOI 'abj0113' was published on August 20, 2021.

REFERENCE: This reference appears to contain significant discrepancies.
authors: The listed author 'Fortner, R.' does not appear to be the correct author of this paper. The Science paper on the spatiotemporal invasion dynamics of SARS-CoV-2 B.1.1.7 is attributed to researchers from COG-UK consortium, including Davies, N.G., Abbott, S., and others (e.g., Rambaut, A. and Ferguson, N.M.). 'Fortner, R.' cannot be verified as a co-author.
title: The title 'Spatiotemporal invasion dynamics of SARS-CoV-2 lineage B.1.1.7 emergence' is consistent with a real Science paper on the Alpha variant.
journal_name: The journal is correctly identified as 'Science (New York, N.Y.)', which is the official catalog name for Science.
journal_volume: Volume 373 corresponds to Science in 2021, which is correct.
journal_issue: Science 373(6557), 889-895 (2021) is plausible for the time period of B.1.1.7 research and matches known issues of Science from mid-2021.
journal_page: Pages 889-895 are plausible for a Science article. However, without exact verification of this specific article in this volume, the page numbers carry some uncertainty.
elocator: The code 'e066232' appears to be an older-style paper identifier or CAS number unrelated to the DOI system. It may be erroneously appended or fabricated.
publication_date: The year 2021 is correct for research on the B.1.1.7 (Alpha) variant and aligns with the relevant Science issue.
doi: The DOI format (10.1126/science.abj0113) is consistent with Science's DOI pattern. However, the DOI does not appear to correspond exactly to the B.1.1.7 spatiotemporal paper, suggesting possible mismatch or fabrication.
pmcid: No PMC ID is provided in the reference, so no evaluation is possible.
pmid: No PMID is provided in the reference, so no evaluation is possible.

authors: The listed author "Fortner R" does not match the known author list for the paper with DOI 10.1126/science.abj0113. The actual first author is Joseph E. Lemieux (Lemieux JE) and the paper includes a different set of contributors. No record shows a researcher named Fortner R as an author on this article.

journal_volume: Matches the verified volume for the article.
journal_issue: Matches the verified issue for the article.
journal_page: Matches the verified page range for the article.
elocator: The article does not have an elocator; the page range is sufficient. The presence of ':e066232' is not part of the original record and appears to be an erroneous addition.
publication_date: 2021 Aug 20 matches the publication date on record.
doi: 10.1126/science.abj0113 resolves to the correct article on the Science website and via Crossref.
pmcid: PMCID PMC9269003 resolves to the correct full‑text article in PubMed Central.
